tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Girls Just Want To Have Fun

content:
Artist: Blessed Union of Souls
Song: I Believe
Tabbed by Jordan Boesch

This song sounds good if you pick the chords aswell.

Capo 4th fret...  Repeat these chords

[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
e|--------0--------0--------0--------3-----------------------------|
B|--------0--------3--------1--------3-----------------------------|
G|--------0--------2--------0--------0-----------------------------|
D|--------2--------0--------2--------0-----------------------------|
A|--------2--------0--------3--------2-----------------------------|
E|--------0--------0--------0--------3-----------------------------|[/tab]

Here's some lyrics to help you understand the pattern if your deaf

[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
Walk blindly to the light and reach out for his hand [/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
Don't ask any questions and don't try to understand [/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Open up your mind and then open up your heart [/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
And you will see that you and me aren't very far apart [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause I believe that love is the answer [/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
I believe that love will find the way [/tab]




* Just keep repeating.. have fun!
